content.en:
"Let's go!"

Ye Tian didn't care if he continued to stay here, and used Tai'ewu blood to make the vortex take the initiative to disconnect, which must have also caused the vibration of the forbidden zerg's lair, and those forbidden zergs would inevitably know about the abnormalities here.

So, soon there will be a forbidden Zerg arrival.

Moreover, there are also wise people among the Forbidden Zerg, if they know that the Dark Blunt Gold Vein has disappeared, maybe they will think that an outsider has infiltrated it, after all, the Forbidden Zerg will not take away the Dark Blunt Gold Vein, but can only be an outsider.

Therefore, there is not much time left for him, and he must get out of here as soon as possible.

Whew!!

Ye Tian moved quickly and shuttled, fortunately, with the hidden effect of the forbidden talent, he was not discovered by the forbidden zerg who passed by.

Soon, a forbidden zerg came to the place where the dark blunt gold vein disappeared.

When they saw that the pile of garbage in the dark blunt gold vein had disappeared, they were very puzzled, but they did not have any wisdom, and they only reported the situation to the lord-level forbidden zerg.

Soon, the Wisdom Forbidden Zerg learned of the situation and immediately asked the Forbidden Zerg to search for the enemy's whereabouts.

And the lord-level forbidden zerg inside the forbidden zerg's lair also dispatched and began to look for the enemy.

Now.

Ye Tian had already arrived at the forbidden Zerg lair passage, flying and shuttling at the fastest speed.

After a while, he came to the outside of the forbidden zerg lair, and without stopping for a moment, he immediately fled away.

Not long after Ye Tian left, the two lord-level forbidden zergs stationed outside the forbidden zerg's lair explored around the forbidden zerg's lair, and the scope continued to expand to the surrounding territory.

Ye Tian sensed the violent aura of the two lord-level forbidden zergs from afar, and knew that the forbidden zerg knew that there was an enemy infiltrating, and he was probably probing at the moment, so he was glad that he was fast enough, otherwise he might not be able to escape successfully.

......

The next journey is relatively safe, without the lord-level forbidden zerg, the other forbidden zergs can't find him at all.

Even on the way to the base, he saw a few forbidden zergs and killed them.

Nine Rivers Base.

Ye Tian came here and entered Ouyang Jiu'er's mansion.

"Brother Ye, how is it, have you succeeded?"

Ouyang Jiu'er asked very urgently.

"It worked!"

Ye Tian projected a corner of the world in his body, and a dark blunt gold vein appeared.

"It's really a dark blunt gold vein!" Ouyang Jiu'er recognized it at a glance and said excitedly.

However, the Dark Blunt Gold Vein is currently impregnated with the blood of Taieu and needs to be separated.

Ouyang Jiu'er and Ye Tian were busy for a long time, and finally extracted the Tai Ewu blood, but some Tai Ewu blood was still wasted in the process.

The dark blunt gold vein is very strong and difficult to refine, Ye Tian used his forbidden weapon, the Sky Slaying Spear, and blessed the forbidden talent: the Dark Spear, cutting the dark blunt gold vein little by little, and cutting it for a long time before finally dividing the dark blunt gold vein into two parts.

Part of it was given to Ouyang Jiu'er, and part of it was kept for himself.

Ouyang Jiu'er put away the dark blunt gold vein, but casually gave Ye Tian a forbidden weapon refining technique inheritance.

"This is a top-level forbidden weapon refining technique, which is very precious, if there is no top-level forbidden weapon refining technique, it will be difficult for the forbidden weapon you refine to reach the top level, and the highest can only refine a high-level forbidden weapon!"

Ouyang Jiu'er said.

"Thank you!"

Ye Tiandao.

Subsequently, Ye Tian returned to the base of Black Wind Mountain and began to ponder the refining of forbidden weapons.

First of all, he studied the top forbidden weapon refining technique, that is, the Black Sky Alchemy Technique.

After thorough enlightenment, Ye Tian began to separate a bit of dark blunt gold and began to merge into his Heaven Slaying Spear.

The Sky Slayer Spear is a medium forbidden weapon, and it is not very far from a high forbidden weapon, but for him now, such a forbidden weapon is not enough.

This time, he obtained so much dark blunt gold, which was just enough for him to refine a more advanced forbidden weapon.

In the accelerated environment of time, Ye Tian tempered his Heaven Killing Spear day by day, and with the addition of Dark Blunt Gold little by little, coupled with the Black Sky Alchemy Technique he mastered, the edge and taboo rules of the Heaven Killing Spear gradually became more and more powerful.

this day.

Ye Tian's Heaven Slaying Spear had finally completed its promotion and had become a high-level forbidden weapon, much more powerful than before.

But Ye Tian continued to merge into the Dark Blunt Gold, anyway, he didn't care about the Dark Blunt Gold at all, and he didn't care about waste, if it was someone else, even if it was a half-step domain ancestor, he would be very heartbroken, and he wouldn't dare to spend the Dark Blunt Gold casually.

With the consumption of a large amount of dark blunt gold, the Sky Slayer Spear completed another promotion, reaching the level of a top-level forbidden weapon.

"That's right, the Sky Slayer Spear is more than dozens of times sharper than before!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

With such a forbidden weapon, his strength is much stronger than before.

Of course, Ye Tian was not satisfied with a top-level forbidden weapon, anyway, he had too much dark blunt gold to use up, and he could completely refine a few more top-level forbidden weapons.

Instead of refining an offensive forbidden weapon, he was ready to refine a piece of defensive armor, and it was a defensive armor that wrapped his whole body.

Under normal circumstances, no one would refine the defensive armor that defended the whole body, after all, it was too wasteful of materials, but Ye Tian was not afraid of wasting it.

It took some more years, and Ye Tian used a lot of dark blunt gold to refine a set of armor, which was named the Immortal Blunt Armor!

"Yue'er, Xingchen, Xingyue, and Xiaoyu They also need forbidden weapons, it's not a good thing to use the top taboo weapons of the attack class, they often fight, once the top taboo weapons are exposed, they are easy to be targeted by others. However, if you give them defensive armor, once they encounter a dangerous situation, they can activate the top-level defensive armor, and they can save their lives!"

As a result, Ye Tian refined four sets of top-level forbidden weapon-level defensive armor for Xiao Yue, Ye Xingchen, Ye Xingyue, and Ye Yu.

When Xiao Yue, Ye Xingchen, Ye Xingyue and Ye Yu came to Ye Tian, they were stunned when they looked at these four sets of forbidden weapon armor.

They are all Dao Ancestors, so they naturally understand the value of top-level forbidden weapons, those invincible Dao Ancestors don't have them, and at present, only those half-step domain ancestors have top-level forbidden weapons, and they are not this kind of defensive armor that covers the whole body!

Such a forbidden weapon is simply too extravagant!

When Ye Tian said that he had obtained a lot of dark blunt gold, and introduced them to the use of dark blunt gold, the four of them all came to their senses.

Immediately, they were very relieved to accept the defensive armor, and promised that it would not be leaked casually, and they would never use it unless they had to.

And Ye Tian also gave them a little dark blunt gold, and let them improve their own offensive forbidden weapons, at least it is not a problem to upgrade to medium forbidden weapons, which is completely enough for them at present.

If in the future, if they want to continue to improve their forbidden weapons, they can come to Ye Tian to receive the Dark Blunt Gold, which is safer.
